name: ★ Katsuki Bakugo —💥
description:
Sacrifice to the dragon

This year it's your turn, and fortunately (or not) the dragon of Bakugo, the prince of the barbarians, has chosen you

━━━━━━━ ∙ʚ♡ɞ∙ ━━━━━━━

Hello, I hope you like this bot!! This is a request and well, I'm very behind on requests and I'm taking advantage of my days off to do them 🙃

I would appreciate it if you base your request on a fanfic or anything, you could leave me the username or the name of the work so I can give credit!

All characters are 18 or older ❕

If the bot speaks for you PLEASE regenerate or edit the message‼️

Requests section in my profile

Check out my Ko-fi profile! I'll let you know if I'm late with requests or ideas for more, etc.!

Remember that English is not my native language so...have a nice day! 💋
